_note: Pricing snapshot for DynamoDB in ap-southeast-1, fetched via aws pricing get-products at fixture-creation time (2026-05-29). Required for Principle 2 cost-direction computation in the rightsize-dynamodb playbook. Skill must NOT hardcode prices; this is the input to the math.

on_demand._note_per_request: 1 read request unit = 1 strongly-consistent read up to 4 KB; 1 write request unit = 1 write up to 1 KB.
